about: I believe everyone deserves a space where they feel truly heard. With over 12 years of experience, I specialize in helping individuals navigate anxiety, depression, and major life transitions with compassion and evidence-based approaches.
aboutExtended: My approach is warm, collaborative, and tailored to you. I draw from CBT, EMDR, and mindfulness-based techniques to help you build the tools you need — not just for today, but for the long run.
tagline: Compassionate therapy for individuals, couples, and families. You don't have to do this alone.

services.title: Individual Therapy
services.description: A private space to explore your thoughts, process emotions, and build resilience at your own pace.

services.title: Couples Counseling
services.description: Strengthen your connection, improve communication, and navigate challenges together.

services.title: Family Therapy
services.description: Heal family dynamics, build understanding, and create a healthier home environment.

services.title: Group Sessions
services.description: Find support and shared understanding in a small, guided group setting.

approaches.title: Cognitive Behavioral Therapy
approaches.description: Identifying and reshaping thought patterns that hold you back, building practical coping skills.

approaches.title: EMDR
approaches.description: Processing trauma and difficult memories in a safe, structured way that helps your brain heal naturally.

approaches.title: Mindfulness-Based
approaches.description: Building present-moment awareness and self-compassion to reduce stress and increase emotional resilience.

steps.title: Reach Out
steps.description: Send a message or call. There's no pressure — just a conversation to see if we're a good fit.

steps.title: Initial Consultation
steps.description: A free 15-minute phone consultation where we'll talk about what's bringing you in and answer any questions.

steps.title: Begin Your Journey
steps.description: We'll start working together at your pace, in a space that feels safe and supportive.

testimonials.text: I was nervous to start therapy, but Sarah made me feel completely at ease from the very first session. She listened without judgment and helped me see things I couldn't on my own.
testimonials.author: — Former Client

testimonials.text: After years of putting it off, I finally reached out. It was one of the best decisions I've ever made. Sarah's approach is gentle but genuinely effective.
testimonials.author: — Former Client

testimonials.text: I didn't think therapy was 'for me,' but Sarah created a space where I felt safe enough to be honest. The tools I've gained have changed how I handle everything.
testimonials.author: — Former Client
